positive: A stylized, highly contrasted geometric illustration of a mountain range at sunrise. The design features sharp, clean silhouettes of peaks and valleys, rendered in deep indigo and warm burnt orange against a gradient pastel sky. Incorporate minimalist abstract geometric shapes (triangles, arcs, stacked blocks) that subtly interact with the mountain profiles, creating a cohesive, visually striking pattern. The overall composition must be centered, suitable for repeat or single-panel apparel printing. Use flat design aesthetics, vector art quality, and thick, clean lines. The style should evoke mid-century modern graphic design meets topographical map abstraction. Perfect for screen printing on fabric, with crisp edges and strong visual impact. Studio quality, high contrast, clean print details.
negative: blur, low quality, text, watermark, signature, cropped, noisy, artifacts, grain, messy, bad composition, gradients (unless intentional sky), logos, trademarks, extra limbs, bad anatomy, realism
